verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When Stephen was accused, lonely and bewildered, No-one that day, would stand by his side, He looked in the heavens and saw the face of Jesus And He rolled him over the tide.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’ve never had a prayer, He couldn’t answer I’ve never shed a tear, He could not dry And when the waves of life. are so hard you can’t mount them He will roll you over the tide.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the world is chasing me, and my life becomes a burden I want to run, but there’s no place to hide, I’ll just look up like old Stephen to the right hand of the Father And He'll roll me over the tide.
